hypothesis: Very strict daily Top-5 scanner gate; tests whether Q1 drawdown control improves further.
Tight daily Top-15 scanner gate; bridges the initial top10/top20 split.
Slightly wider than the initial Top-20 winner; tests whether extra candidates add return.
Medium daily Top-30 scanner gate; tests whether top20 benefit persists with more breadth.
Wide-but-not-top50 gate; tests where rank dilution starts hurting.
